block_00: Try our new feature — Create a Watchlist filled with your favourite trading assets!
block_02: Your favourite assets all in one place
block_04: We are excited to share our new feature with you. From now on, you can collect your favourite trading assets into a Watchlist. With this feature we hope to facilitate the trading process by making it more adjustable and personalized.
block_06: The Watchlist is placed in the asset selector menu of the
block_08: Open the asset selector by clicking on the “+” button.
block_09: To add a trading asset to the Watchlist, simply click on the star icon opposite the asset’s name. To remove the asset, find it in the Watchlist and click on the star icon once again. You can access and edit your Watchlist at any time.
